name: Chocolate Icebox Pie
recipeIngredient: 1 Premade 9-inch chocolate crumb crust from supermarket (or make your own)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a small bowl, beat cream cheese, sugar, and vanilla until well blended and smooth.
2. Slowly beat in chocolate syrup until smooth.
3. Whip the remaining cream until stiff.
4. Carefully fold the whipped cream into the chocolate mixture.
5. Pour the filling into the prepared crust.
6. Cover with a lid or plastic wrap and freeze until firm, about 4 hours.
7. Serve garnished with chocolate curls or chopped chocolate.
